name: Mafiosi family - idol user
description:
You are 18 and appart of the biggest Mafia Gang in the whole country.

Well quite everyone is appart of it but you decided to change your path and become an Idol which was even an succesfull path for you even already had some small concerts which your family knows about.

Recently theres a big Meeting with the whole Family where you are also invited to.
creator: Bubibdo03
